ground_truth.title: Day Use Hotels in New York | Hourly Rates | HotelsByDay
ground_truth.main_content: 91 day use hotels in New York, United States. Book hourly hotels and day rooms for short stays, business, or a daycation. Best Western Premier Herald Square - rated 4.4/5 (1557 reviews), Pay Later at property, Free cancellation, from $84 for 10AM-3PM. AC Hotel New York Times Square - rated 4.4/5 (1725 reviews), Workspace, Cozy/Romantic, Work Friendly, from $259 for multiple time slots. La Quinta Times Square South - rated 4.4/5 (814 reviews), Pay Later at property, Free cancellation, from $89 for 10AM-4PM. The Wall Street Inn - rated 4.2/5 (372 reviews), Pay Later at property, Free cancellation. Filter by Location, Reservation policy, Hotel Services, Business Amenities, Fitness Features, and Accessibility. Sort by Earliest Check-in, Latest Check-out, Lowest price, Highest price, Top Rated, Nearest, or Coins Boost.
